svg.aria-label: AWS Network Load Balancer and Security Group used to build a Zero Trust database access gateway, covering least-privilege Security Group policy, Terraform infrastructure automation, centralized RDS and ElastiCache routing, and audit logging for compliance.
svg.title: 2025-10-03: AWS NLB + Security Group, Zero Trust database access gateway build

g.text: Manual IP updates : no centralized path : traffic...
NLB single entry : Security Group per-tier :...
Terraform module : SG ingress by service only :...
Zero Trust path : VPC private subnet : cross-team...
Single gateway enforces policy : full access log...
Security Group min-rule : automated drift detection :...
NLB health check + failover : zero-downtime SG update :...
